disclaimer: This is an illustrative sample only. It is not legal, tax, mortgage, employment, debt, benefits, pension, investment, medical, mental health or financial advice.

summary.headline: Under the sample assumptions, the baseline runway appears manageable, but stress scenarios show how quickly the picture changes if replacement income is delayed or fixed costs remain high.

sections.title: Package estimate
sections.body: The sample model combines an enhanced redundancy package, notice pay, holiday pay and cash savings. Statutory redundancy remains visible as a reference figure when an enhanced amount is entered.

sections.title: Runway range
sections.body: Baseline, slow recovery, severe case and structural case scenarios illustrate how the sample assumptions change the runway.

sections.title: Pressure points
sections.body: Housing, essential costs and replacement income timing are the main pressure points in this sample.

sections.title: Questions to take forward
sections.body: Verify package figures, fixed monthly costs and income recovery assumptions before relying on any personal model.
